scripts.prebuild:ios: npx expo prebuild --platform ios && node -e "var fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');var src=path.join(process.cwd(),'native','LocalPods','DualCamera'),dst=path.join(process.cwd(),'ios','LocalPods','DualCamera');fs.rmSync(dst,{recursive:true,force:true});function copy(s,d){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(var e of fs.readdirSync(s,{withFileTypes:true})){var sp=path.join(s,e.name),dp=path.join(d,e.name);e.isDirectory()?copy(sp,dp):fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp);}};copy(src,dst);console.log('Native files synced to ios/');"
scripts.eas-build-pre-install: node -e "var fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');var src=path.join(process.cwd(),'native','LocalPods','DualCamera'),dst=path.join(process.cwd(),'ios','LocalPods','DualCamera');if(!fs.existsSync(path.join(process.cwd(),'ios','Podfile'))){console.log('[eas-build-pre-install] ios/ not found, running expo prebuild...');var child=require('child_process');child.execSync('npx expo prebuild --platform ios',{stdio:'inherit'});}if(fs.existsSync(path.join(process.cwd(),'ios','Podfile'))){fs.rmSync(dst,{recursive:true,force:true});function copy(s,d){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(var e of fs.readdirSync(s,{withFileTypes:true})){var sp=path.join(s,e.name),dp=path.join(d,e.name);e.isDirectory()?copy(sp,dp):fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp);}};copy(src,dst);console.log('[eas-build-pre-install] Native files synced to ios/');}else{console.log('[eas-build-pre-install] Still no ios/, skipping sync');}"
